description: As the company moves to the cloud, a GRC analyst must create a new Cloud Security Policy from scratch.

nodes.task_description: Research industry best practices and frameworks for cloud security (e.g., CSA Cloud Controls Matrix).

expected_outcome.value: Analyst gathers relevant best practice information.

nodes.task_description: Draft a new policy that covers key cloud security topics like identity management, data protection, and infrastructure configuration.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst drafts a comprehensive and well-structured policy.

nodes.task_description: Circulate the draft policy to key stakeholders (e.g., cloud engineering, legal) for review and feedback before seeking final approval.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst effectively manages the stakeholder review process.
